name: network-engineer
description: Expert network engineer specializing in modern cloud networking,
capabilities: Design multi-cloud network architectures with zero-trust connectivity
Configure and optimize load balancers across AWS, Azure, and GCP
Implement SSL/TLS termination with automated certificate management
Troubleshoot network connectivity issues using diagnostic tools
Set up service mesh and container networking with Kubernetes
Optimize CDN configuration for global application performance
author: sickn33
securitySummary: This is a prompt-only skill with no executable code. The static analyzer scanned 0 files and detected 0 potential security issues. Risk score is 0/100. The skill provides network engineering expertise through text-based prompts only, with no scripts, network calls, filesystem access, or external command execution capabilities. No suspicious patterns or risk factors were detected.
valueStatement: Get expert guidance on designing secure, high-performance cloud network architectures across AWS, Azure, and GCP. This skill helps you implement zero-trust security, optimize load balancing, and troubleshoot complex networking issues.
limitations: Cannot execute network commands or modify live infrastructure
Cannot access real network devices or cloud consoles
Cannot perform actual network testing or packet capture
Provides guidance only, not automated implementation

useCases.title: Design secure multi-cloud architecture
useCases.description: Create a network architecture that connects AWS, Azure, and GCP with zero-trust security principles and redundant connectivity

useCases.title: Troubleshoot connectivity issues
useCases.description: Diagnose and resolve intermittent connectivity problems in Kubernetes service mesh or cloud VPC environments

useCases.title: Optimize application performance
useCases.description: Improve global application performance through CDN optimization, load balancing tuning, and network latency reduction

promptTemplates.title: Basic network design request
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a secure VPC architecture for a three-tier application with public subnets, private subnets, and database subnets. Include NAT gateways and security group recommendations.
promptTemplates.scenario: Create a foundational cloud network design

promptTemplates.title: Load balancing configuration
promptTemplates.prompt: Help me configure global load balancing with health checks and automatic failover for a multi-region deployment. I need both layer 4 and layer 7 support.

promptTemplates.title: SSL/TLS implementation
promptTemplates.prompt: Explain how to implement SSL/TLS termination with automated certificate renewal using Let's Encrypt. Include mTLS configuration for service-to-service communication.

promptTemplates.title: Network troubleshooting
promptTemplates.prompt: I am experiencing intermittent connectivity issues between my Kubernetes pods. The symptoms include high latency and occasional timeouts. Walk me through the troubleshooting steps.

bestPractices: Always design for failure - implement redundancy at every network layer
Use Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation) for reproducible network configurations
Apply zero-trust principles: never trust, always verify, least privilege access
antiPatterns: Do not expose databases directly to the internet - use private endpoints and VPNs
Avoid hardcoding credentials or API keys in network configurations
Do not skip network segmentation - always use VPCs, subnets, and security groups

faq.question: What cloud providers does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill provides expertise for AWS, Azure, and GCP. It covers VPC design, load balancing, DNS, and security configurations for all three major cloud providers.

faq.question: Can this skill help with network troubleshooting?
faq.answer: Yes. It provides systematic troubleshooting methodologies using tools like tcpdump, Wireshark, and cloud-specific diagnostics. It guides you through diagnosing connectivity, latency, and performance issues.

faq.question: Does this skill implement actual network changes?
faq.answer: No. This skill provides guidance, configurations, and best practices. It does not execute commands or modify live infrastructure. You must implement changes manually in your environment.

faq.question: What is zero-trust networking?
faq.answer: Zero-trust is a security model that assumes no implicit trust. Every request is authenticated, authorized, and encrypted. It uses identity-based access, micro-segmentation, and continuous verification.

faq.question: Can this skill help with Kubernetes networking?
faq.answer: Yes. It covers Kubernetes networking, CNI plugins (Calico, Cilium), service mesh (Istio, Linkerd), network policies, and ingress controllers.

faq.question: Does this skill support compliance requirements?
faq.answer: Yes. It provides guidance for network compliance with regulations like GDPR, HIPAA, and PCI-DSS. It includes security architecture recommendations and auditing best practices.
